March 22 · 2026
hero.designNotes: Dark-luxury minimal hero in near-black (0d0b0e) with warm gold (#c9a96e) and soft plum accent orbs creating depth through layered radial gradients and a subtle noise texture. An asymmetric three-column grid anchors the composition: a date badge column on the left, the primary typographic centerpiece in the middle (Cormorant Garamond at display scale for the names, Manrope for supporting copy), and a soft countdown panel on the right — all flanked by SVG botanical vine illustrations. A slowly rotating ampersand ring adds kinetic elegance without JavaScript. The hero message is rendered in restrained warm-cream at reduced opacity to maintain hierarchy. Dashed SVG ornamental rules with a petal-diamond motif frame the content top and bottom. Floating petal particles drift via pure CSS keyframes. On mobile (≤640px), the grid collapses to a single column with the side panels reordering as horizontal strips, preserving visual richness. The palette and typography feel luxury-editorial while remaining culturally warm and modern.
